description.short: Dataverse MCP-powered launch agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot
description.full: Episode 13: a declarative agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot that consumes the Dataverse MCP server as an MCP App action. Same Dataverse data and business skills as the Ep 7 Launch Coordinator, but exposed through the new MCP Apps pattern instead of the Dataverse Search knowledge capability.
